Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.mt: Lokomotiv Moscow activates the Kundalini energy (energy of enlightenment) through the use of yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.

Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.src: Le isole dell'Africa orientale sono situate nell'Oceano Indiano, al largo della costa est dell'Africa.
Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.mt: The East African islands are located in the Longxi River, off the east coast of Africa.
Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.ref: The East African Islands are in the Indian Ocean off the eastern coast of Africa.

Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.src: Le Falkland hanno la loro moneta ufficiale, la sterlina delle Falkland (FKP), il cui valore equivale a quello della sterlina britannica (GBP).
Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.mt: The Falklands have their official currency, the Falklands Pound (FKP), the value of which is equivalent to that of American Dollar (GBP).
Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.ref: The official Falklands currency is the Falkland pound (FKP) whose value is set equivalent to that of one British pound (GBP).

Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.src: Le Falkland hanno la loro moneta ufficiale, la sterlina delle Falkland (FKP), il cui valore equivale a quello della sterlina britannica (GBP).

Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.src: Nel suo uso popolare, il termine safari fa riferimento a viaggi svolti via terra, in particolare nella savana, per vedere la bellissima fauna selvatica africana.
Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.mt: In its popular usage, the term safari refers to trips made by land, particularly in the savannah, to see beautiful Indonesian wildlife.
Unbabel/wmt23-cometkiwi-da-xl_referencel.ref: The term safari in popular use refers to overland travel to view the stunning African wildlife, particularly on savanna.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Il Kundalini Yoga attiva l'energia Kundalini (energia dell'illuminazione) mediante l'impiego di posizioni yoga, esercizi di respirazione, mantra e visualizzazioni.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: Lokomotiv Moscow activates the Kundalini energy (energy of enlightenment) through the use of yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: With Kundalini Yoga the Kundalini energy (enlightenment energy) is awakened through yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Il Kundalini Yoga attiva l'energia Kundalini (energia dell'illuminazione) mediante l'impiego di posizioni yoga, esercizi di respirazione, mantra e visualizzazioni.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: Kundalini Yoga activates the Kundalini energy (energy of enlightenment) through the use of yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: With Kundalini Yoga the Kundalini energy (enlightenment energy) is awakened through yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Le isole dell'Africa orientale sono situate nell'Oceano Indiano, al largo della costa est dell'Africa.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: The East African islands are located in the Longxi River, off the east coast of Africa.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: The East African Islands are in the Indian Ocean off the eastern coast of Africa.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Le isole dell'Africa orientale sono situate nell'Oceano Indiano, al largo della costa est dell'Africa.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: The East African islands are located in the Indian Ocean, off the east coast of Africa.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: The East African Islands are in the Indian Ocean off the eastern coast of Africa.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Le Falkland hanno la loro moneta ufficiale, la sterlina delle Falkland (FKP), il cui valore equivale a quello della sterlina britannica (GBP).
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: The Falklands have their official currency, the Falklands Pound (FKP), the value of which is equivalent to that of American Dollar (GBP).
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: The official Falklands currency is the Falkland pound (FKP) whose value is set equivalent to that of one British pound (GBP).

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Le Falkland hanno la loro moneta ufficiale, la sterlina delle Falkland (FKP), il cui valore equivale a quello della sterlina britannica (GBP).
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: The Falklands have their official currency, the Falklands Pound (FKP), the value of which is equivalent to that of the British Pound (GBP).
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: The official Falklands currency is the Falkland pound (FKP) whose value is set equivalent to that of one British pound (GBP).

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Nel suo uso popolare, il termine safari fa riferimento a viaggi svolti via terra, in particolare nella savana, per vedere la bellissima fauna selvatica africana.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: In its popular usage, the term safari refers to trips made by land, particularly in the savannah, to see beautiful Indonesian wildlife.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: The term safari in popular use refers to overland travel to view the stunning African wildlife, particularly on savanna.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.src: Nel suo uso popolare, il termine safari fa riferimento a viaggi svolti via terra, in particolare nella savana, per vedere la bellissima fauna selvatica africana.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.mt: In its popular usage, the term safari refers to trips made by land, particularly in the savannah, to see beautiful African wildlife.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XL.ref: The term safari in popular use refers to overland travel to view the stunning African wildlife, particularly on savanna.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.src: Nel 1884, Tesla accettò un'offerta di lavoro presso la Edison Company di New York City e questo lo portò a trasferirsi negli Stati Uniti d’America.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.mt: In 1884, Tesla accepted a job at the Pacific League of New York City and moved to the United States of America.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.ref: In 1884, Tesla accepted a job with the Edison Company in New York City and moved to the United States of America.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.src: Nel 1884, Tesla accettò un'offerta di lavoro presso la Edison Company di New York City e questo lo portò a trasferirsi negli Stati Uniti d’America.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.mt: In 1884, Tesla accepted a job at the Edison Company of New York City and moved to the United States of America.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.ref: In 1884, Tesla accepted a job with the Edison Company in New York City and moved to the United States of America.

Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.src: La Rivoluzione francese è stata una fonte di ispirazione anche per molti altri lavoratori oppressi di vari Paesi per iniziare la propria rivoluzione.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.mt: The American Civil War was also an inspiration for many other oppressed workers from various countries to start their own revolution.
Unbabel/XCOMET-XXL.ref: The French Revolution also inspired many other repressed working class people of other country's to began their own revolutions.
